chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-3504 of 2016 Khalil Ahmed and others Versus Securities & Exchange Commission of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.17752/2016. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 28.10.2024 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. On the last date of hearing petitioner’s counsel was put on notice that in case he fails to appear and address the question framed earlier, this petition shall be dismissed for non- prosecution. Today counsel is called absent and there is no intimation either. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
